seoTitle: Huntley vs Huntleys Point — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Huntley and Huntleys Point. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Huntley vs Huntleys Point: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Huntley and Huntleys Point.
heading: Huntley vs Huntleys Point — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Huntley, New South Wales and Huntleys Point, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Huntley has a lower overall climate risk score (42/100) compared to Huntleys Point (48/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Huntley or Huntleys Point safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Huntley has a flood risk score of 40/100, while Huntleys Point scores 55/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Huntley scores 53/100 for bushfire risk. Huntleys Point scores 58/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Huntley or Huntleys Point?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Huntley has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.65% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
